_schema: PO headline KPIs. Populated by refresh-po-invoice-hub skill from queries/po-core-dataset.redshift.sql.
_notes: Live-client filter only: clients.company_status_type_id = 4. Rapid/Standard cluster_id filter is dropped because the details JSONB column is not mirrored to Redshift (see reference/design-provenance.md).
GMV figures use a $1M/PO cap to exclude obvious data-entry outliers (p99 real value = $9,500; max unfiltered = $5.4T fat-finger).
PO scope: ap_headers with ap_header_type_id=4, sub_type IN (4,11,19,20), is_template=false.
The refresh script re-runs this whole file; do not hand-edit.
